action_boundary: Should demo purchase release S7-PO-002 proceed under grant G7-B?
communication_boundary: Budget clearance must bind the same grant, supplier, and purchase line.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, logistics, public-benefits, legal, or operational data.
Demo release S7-002 asks to release line PO7-L2 for supplier Field Kit Demo under grant G7-B.
Budget clearance BUD-S7-002 names grant G7-B, supplier Field Kit Demo, and line PO7-L2.
Purchase order PO-S7-002 lists line PO7-L2 for sample kits.
Grant rule GRANT-S7-002 covers sample kits when the supplier and line are named.
Purchase release requires budget clearance for the same grant, supplier, and purchase line.
